pathmind.tutorial.welcome.title: Welcome to Pathmind
pathmind.tutorial.welcome.body: This tour opens the working Example 1 preset and follows it from Start to finish while introducing the editor around it.
pathmind.tutorial.presets.title: Preset Tabs
pathmind.tutorial.presets.body: Example 1 is open now. Presets save complete workspaces, and the tabs across the top let you switch between them.
pathmind.tutorial.sidebar.title: Node Library
pathmind.tutorial.sidebar.body: Open categories on the left and drag nodes onto the canvas. The library contains native actions, control flow, sensors, variables, and parameter cards.
pathmind.tutorial.workspace.title: Graph Workspace
pathmind.tutorial.workspace.body: The canvas holds the graph. Wires carry execution from left to right, and yellow sticky notes explain important sections. Pan and zoom to navigate larger systems.
pathmind.tutorial.exampleStart.title: Start And Wires
pathmind.tutorial.exampleStart.body: The green manual Start is this graph's entry point. Its output wire leads to the first action. A workspace can contain several Starts with different launch modes.
pathmind.tutorial.exampleIntro.title: Messages And Fields
pathmind.tutorial.exampleIntro.body: Send Message introduces the routine. Editable fields live inside nodes, and Client Side visibility keeps this message local to you.
pathmind.tutorial.exampleLook.title: Look And Parameter Cards
pathmind.tutorial.exampleLook.body: Look receives a Direction card in its labeled slot. Parameter cards snap into host nodes and supply typed values—in this case, the cardinal direction south.
pathmind.tutorial.exampleWalk.title: Combining Parameters
pathmind.tutorial.exampleWalk.body: Walk combines two cards: Direction decides where to face and Duration decides how long to move. Edit either card to change the same action node's behavior.
pathmind.tutorial.exampleActions.title: Finishing The Sequence
pathmind.tutorial.exampleActions.body: Jump performs one immediate world action, Wait pauses execution for half a second, and the final message confirms that the full wire sequence completed.
pathmind.tutorial.run.title: Run And Stop
pathmind.tutorial.run.body: Stand in a safe open area, then press Play to run Example 1. Stop halts execution. The default hotkeys are K to play and J to stop.
pathmind.tutorial.validation.title: Check Issues
pathmind.tutorial.validation.body: Open validation to find missing inputs, incompatible attachments, unreachable nodes, and other graph problems before running.
pathmind.tutorial.marketplace.title: Marketplace
pathmind.tutorial.marketplace.body: Browse community presets here, or publish a workflow of your own. You can replay this guided Example 1 tour any time from Settings.

pathmind.node.type.break.desc: Breaks the targeted block or a block provided by an attached value
pathmind.node.type.clickScreen.desc: Clicks the current GUI at the configured screen coordinates
pathmind.node.type.controlIf.desc: Run the next branch only when a condition is true
pathmind.node.type.controlIfElse.desc: Run one of two branches depending on a condition
pathmind.node.type.controlFork.desc: Split execution into two parallel branches
pathmind.node.type.controlJoinAny.desc: Continue when either incoming branch arrives
pathmind.node.type.controlJoinAll.desc: Continue only after both incoming branches arrive
pathmind.node.type.controlRepeat.desc: Repeats enclosed nodes a set number of times
pathmind.node.type.controlRepeatUntil.de: Repeats enclosed nodes until a condition becomes true
pathmind.node.type.controlWaitUntil.desc: Pause this branch until a condition becomes true

pathmind.node.type.addToList.desc: Adds a matching value to a named list, using nearby targets when applicable

pathmind.node.type.dropSlot.desc: Drops the selected item, or items from a matched slot or item parameter, with an optional amount
pathmind.node.type.equipArmor.desc: Equips armor from an inventory slot
pathmind.node.type.equipHand.desc: Moves an inventory item into a hand
pathmind.node.type.eventCall.desc: Triggers the execution of a named function
pathmind.node.type.eventFunction.desc: Runs a named function body when triggered
pathmind.node.type.explore.desc: Explores the world from the selected origin
pathmind.node.type.follow.desc: Follows a selected player or entity target
pathmind.node.type.goto.desc: Moves to the selected coordinate or block target
pathmind.node.type.travel.desc: Moves to the selected target using Pathmind navigation
pathmind.node.type.interact.desc: Interacts with the targeted block or entity
pathmind.node.type.listItem.desc: Returns an entry from a named list by index
pathmind.node.type.removeFirstFromList.d: Removes the first entry from a named list
pathmind.node.type.removeLastFromList.de: Removes the last entry from a named list
pathmind.node.type.removeListItem.desc: Removes an entry from a named list by index
pathmind.node.type.removeFromList.desc: Removes all matching values from a named list
pathmind.node.type.listLength.desc: Returns the current number of entries in a named list
pathmind.node.type.message.desc: Displays text or sends a message in chat
pathmind.node.type.template.desc: References another preset with a live preview

pathmind.node.type.operatorBooleanAnd.de: Returns true when both boolean inputs are true
pathmind.node.type.operatorBooleanXor.de: Returns true when exactly one boolean input is true
pathmind.node.type.operatorEquals.desc: Returns true when two values are equal
pathmind.node.type.operatorGreater.desc: Returns true when one value is greater than another
pathmind.node.type.operatorLess.desc: Returns true when one value is less than another

pathmind.node.type.operatorNot.desc: Returns true when two values are not equal
pathmind.node.type.operatorRandom.desc: Generates a random number between a minimum and maximum value
pathmind.node.type.sensorJoinedServer.de: Detects whether a specific user recently joined the server

pathmind.node.type.paramBoolean.desc: Provides a true or false value

pathmind.node.type.paramCoordinate.desc: Provides reusable X, Y, Z coordinates
pathmind.node.type.paramDirection.desc: Provides an exact yaw/pitch direction or a cardinal direction
pathmind.node.type.paramEntity.desc: Selects a loaded entity target (64-block default search range)
pathmind.node.type.paramGui.desc: Provides a screen or container type
pathmind.node.type.paramInventorySlot.de: Provides an inventory or container slot reference
pathmind.node.type.paramItem.desc: Selects an item and optional quantity; world-item searches use loaded entities within 64 blocks
pathmind.node.type.paramMessage.desc: Provides reusable chat, book, or sign text
pathmind.node.type.paramPlaceTarget.desc: Provides a block and placement coordinates
pathmind.node.type.paramRotation.desc: Provides yaw and pitch rotation data with optional offsets and distance
pathmind.node.type.paramVillagerTrade.de: Represents a villager trade selected from an open merchant screen
pathmind.node.type.paramWaypoint.desc: Provides a waypoint name and optional range
pathmind.node.type.path.desc: Starts pathfinding to the current goal
pathmind.node.type.pressKey.desc: Simulates pressing either a keyboard key or a mouse button
pathmind.node.type.place.desc: Places a selected block at coordinates
pathmind.node.type.placeHand.desc: Places the held block from the selected hand
pathmind.node.type.runPreset.desc: Launches every START node in the selected preset, then continues immediately. Use ↗ to open it.
pathmind.node.type.sensorAtCoordinates.d: True while the player's occupied block position matches the selected whole-number coordinates

pathmind.node.type.sensorFabricEvent.des: Returns true when the selected Fabric or NeoForge client event fired within a time window
pathmind.node.type.sensorDistanceBetween: Returns the straight-line distance between two loaded targets (256-block default target range)

pathmind.node.type.sensorCurrentGui.desc: Returns the currently open screen or container type
pathmind.node.type.sensorHealthBelow.des: Returns true when player health is below a threshold
pathmind.node.type.sensorHungerBelow.des: Returns true when player hunger is below a threshold
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsDaytime.desc: Returns true when it is daytime
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsFalling.desc: Returns true when the player is falling at least the selected distance
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsInLava.desc: Returns true when the player is touching lava
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsOnGround.desc: Returns the current distance between the player and the ground below
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsRaining.desc: Returns true when it is raining or snowing
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsRendered.desc: True when the selected target is loaded inside the client's render search area; walls do not make it false
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsSwimming.desc: Returns true when the player is swimming
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsUnderwater.de: Returns true when the player is fully submerged
pathmind.node.type.sensorIsVisible.desc: True when the selected loaded target is in view with an unobstructed line of sight
pathmind.node.type.sensorItemInInventory: Returns true when the player has the selected item
pathmind.node.type.sensorItemInSlot.desc: Returns true when the selected item is in the selected slot
pathmind.node.type.sensorKeyPressed.desc: Returns true when the selected keyboard key is held
pathmind.node.type.sensorLookDirection.d: Returns the player's current look rotation as yaw and pitch
pathmind.node.type.sensorCurrentHand.des: Returns the currently selected hotbar slot
pathmind.node.type.sensorPositionOf.desc: Returns a target's current position; nearby target searches only inspect loaded chunks and entities
pathmind.node.type.sensorSlotItemCount.d: Returns the current item count in the selected inventory slot
pathmind.node.type.sensorFindTrade.desc: Returns the villager trade in the selected numbered slot of an open merchant screen
pathmind.node.type.sensorInStock.desc: Returns true when the selected villager trade is in stock
pathmind.node.type.sensorTargetedBlock.d: Returns the block the player is targeting
Returns the entity the player is targeting
pathmind.node.type.sensorTargetedBlockFa: Returns the face of the block the player is targeting
pathmind.node.type.sensorTouchingBlock.d: True when any side of the player's collision box touches the selected block's shape
Returns true when the player is touching the selected entity
pathmind.node.type.sensorVariableIs.desc: Detect if a variable matches a value
pathmind.node.type.sensorVillagerTrade.d: Returns true when the open villager trade list contains the selected trade number
pathmind.node.type.calculate.desc: Evaluates one or more numeric expressions
pathmind.node.type.setVariable.desc: Assigns a parameter value to a variable at runtime
pathmind.node.type.startChain.desc: Starts a node tree by Start number
pathmind.node.type.stickyNote.desc: A freeform note you can place in the workspace
pathmind.node.type.swing.desc: Performs a hand swing and attacks if targeting an entity
pathmind.node.type.trade.desc: Executes the villager trade at the selected number when the merchant screen is open
pathmind.node.type.uiUtils.desc: Accesses UI-Utils actions like packet toggles and GUI control
pathmind.node.type.use.desc: Uses the selected hand or attached item value

pathmind.node.type.writeSign.desc: Writes text into an open sign editor
